content: The multi-perspective reflection approaches explored in LLM self-reflection mechanisms can fill a critical gap in the original Self-Refine framework, creating a hybrid system where Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop is augmented with inconsistent solving perspectives to catch blind spots a single self-feedback perspective would miss. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or fine-tuning, while addressing its limitation of being trapped in the LLM's own biased initial reasoning frame.
